Support Center

Help & FAQ

Everything you need to know to get the most out of CropGuard's AI-powered features.

Go to Predict Disease, upload a clear photo of an affected leaf, select your crop type if known, and click Analyze. The AI will identify the disease and suggest detailed treatment options within seconds.

Still have questions?

Reach out through the Contact page — we'd love to help!
